Our matte-finish double-walled stainless steel water bottle keeps drinks icy cold for up to 24 hours and steamy hot for 12, with a leakproof one-handed flip lid ideal for morning commutes, weekend hikes, and daily desk use.
It fits snugly in standard car cup holders, comes in a range of muted on-trend colors to match your personal style, and is 100% BPA-free, durable enough to survive accidental drops and months of daily use.
Ditch single-use plastic water bottles for this eco-friendly reusable option to cut down on landfill waste while staying conveniently hydrated on the go.
